title: papaver nyingchiense
intro: Papaver nyingchiense, a species of poppy, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing fever, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's alkaloids are often extracted and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
